channel.title: ShovelsSale Blog
channel.description: A structured archive of market infrastructure, shovel economy strategy, and system-level analysis from ShovelsSale.com.

item.title: Why Pick-and-Shovel Wins in 2026 — ShovelsSale.com
item.description: Why Pick-and-Shovel Wins in 2026. Pick-and-shovel strategy for the AI era.

item.title: The No-Code AI Stack — ShovelsSale.com
item.description: Build a real AI product this weekend. 3 platforms, zero ML experience needed, one working product by Sunday.
